title: clitoria javitensis
intro: Clitoria javitensis, also known as butterfly pea or Asian pigeonwings, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia and Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in various nutrients and offers several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and acting as an anti-cancer agent. The herbal preparations of Clitoria javitensis include tea, capsule, and powder forms, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
